No Poverty.reason: The course content focuses on language acquisition and does not provide any evidence related to poverty eradication or economic resources.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course content focuses on language acquisition and does not provide any evidence related to hunger, food security, or nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course content focuses on language acquisition and does not provide any evidence related to health outcomes or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: As an advanced university course, it provides tertiary education (4.3) and develops advanced language and communication skills (4.4). It also fosters global citizenship and appreciation of cultural diversity (4.7).

Gender Equality.reason: The course content focuses on language acquisition and does not provide any evidence related to gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: The course content focuses on language acquisition and does not provide any evidence related to water, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course content focuses on language acquisition and does not provide any evidence related to energy access or clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course includes a writing activity on 'Business Life' and develops the ability to participate in international exchange, which are relevant skills for employment and decent work (Target 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: A writing activity on 'Science and Technology' provides language skills to discuss innovation, offering a tangential link to enhancing scientific research and technological capabilities (Target 9.5).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course fosters the ability to appreciate diverse cultures, which promotes intercultural understanding and social inclusion, aligning with the spirit of reducing inequalities (Target 10.2).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The ability to appreciate diverse cultures (Core Competency E) has a minimal, inferred link to safeguarding cultural heritage (Target 11.4), as appreciation can precede protection.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course content focuses on language acquisition and does not provide any evidence related to sustainable consumption or production patterns.

Climate Action.reason: The course content focuses on language acquisition and does not provide any evidence related to climate change or environmental action.

Life Below Water.reason: The course content focuses on language acquisition and does not provide any evidence related to marine ecosystems or life below water.

Life on Land.reason: The course content focuses on language acquisition and does not provide any evidence related to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course fosters intercultural communication and appreciation of diverse cultures, which are foundational for international understanding and can indirectly contribute to peace and non-violence (Target 16.1).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course develops the 'ability to participate in international exchange affairs,' which is a key skill for fostering global partnerships, cooperation, and knowledge sharing (Targets 17.6, 17.9, 17.16).
